overview.what: A production-ready Todo application with a dedicated backend API and persistent database storage. It includes user authentication, secure route protection, and a clean separation of concerns between the React frontend and Express backend.
overview.how_it_works: The app uses a 3-tier architecture. The React frontend communicates with an Express API via REST. Data persistence is handled by PostgreSQL through the Prisma ORM, and security is enforced using JWT tokens stored in HTTP-only cookies.
what_you_learn: Using an ORM (Prisma) for database migrations
Secure authentication with JWT and bcrypt
Creating RESTful API endpoints for CRUD

files.description: Express server setup with Prisma integration.
Prisma schema for the PostgreSQL database.
